title: Make Project Inbox visible on the default mobile home
outputs: Default mobile home displays recent project inbox entries
Each entry exposes project name, runtime/host health, and last reply/issue/approval preview
Users can switch projects from the default home without opening the tools sheet
do_not_do: Do not add mobile file editing
Do not change project registry protocol fields
Do not remove the existing tools-sheet project manager
Do not stage unrelated untracked files
